front: What is the significance of O-GlcNAcylation as a nutrient sensor?
back: O-GlcNAc transferase (OGT) adds GlcNAc to Ser/Thr residues using UDP-GlcNAc from the hexosamine biosynthetic pathway. It competes with phosphorylation and acts as a nutrient/glucose sensor. Dysregulation occurs in diabetes and cancer.
